html:
2026-0247
2026-03-25FINRoyal Canadian Mint Act
Financial Administration ActAppointment of the Master of the Mint on an interim basisAppointment of Simon Kamel of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Master of the Mint on an interim basis, to hold office during pleasure for a term of eight months, or until such time as a new Master of the Mint is appointed, whichever occurs first, effective March 31, 2026.N/A
act:
Royal Canadian Mint Act
Financial Administration Act
subject: Appointment of the Master of the Mint on an interim basis
precis: Appointment of Simon Kamel of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Master of the Mint on an interim basis, to hold office during pleasure for a term of eight months, or until such time as a new Master of the Mint is appointed, whichever occurs first, effective March 31, 2026.
